description: Standard: by-the-numbers box for education article

input.topic: Feature on the nationwide teacher shortage
facts: 36,000 vacant teaching positions unfilled at start of 2025-26 school year
Average teacher salary: $65,000 nationally, ranging from $45,000 in Mississippi to $92,000 in New York
Teacher attrition rate: 8% annually, up from 5.5% in 2019
44% of new teachers leave the profession within 5 years
12 states have lowered certification requirements since 2022

input.topic: Brief on a bridge repair project
facts: 2021: Federal infrastructure bill allocates $4.2M for repairs
